_meta.name: new-project-interview
_meta.purpose: Exercises the pgwen new conversational interview. Each chat() text MUST be a JSON-encoded turn response per src/cli/NewProject.ts:402 (parseTurnResponse). Turn types: 'question', 'blueprint', 'ready', 'warning'. The flow below covers the canonical happy path: one question → blueprint (approved) → ready.
_meta.scenario: Project author wants a project that uploads a CSV to a portal and verifies the upload.

response.text: {"type":"question","questions":["Which target environment should this project default to (test / staging)?"],"field":"target_env","help":"Test-only is safest; staging when you need real CSVs."}

{"type":"blueprint","summary":"A test-environment CSV upload project that verifies the uploaded row appears in the result table by unique filename. Cleans up after itself via @Finally.","folder_structure":"example-csv-uploader/
├── pgwen.conf
├── pgwen/
│   ├── conf/profiles/Upload.conf
│   ├── conf/env/test.json
│   ├── meta/{Login,Upload,Cleanup}.meta
│   ├── features/upload.feature
│   └── input/uploads.csv
└── package.json","selected_capabilities":["login-flow","file-upload","result-table-assertion","finally-cleanup","data-feed-csv"],"excluded_capabilities":["api-testing","multi-window"],"scripts":{"pgwen":"pgwen -p Upload"},"sample_files":["pgwen/input/uploads.csv"],"ci_cd":"GitHub Actions on push","assumptions":["Portal uses username+password login","Result table has a filename column we can locate by text"],"risks":["Test env credentials must be configured in pgwen/conf/env/test.json"],"todos":["Set portal.url in pgwen/conf/env/test.json to your test environment URL","Add real test credentials to pgwen/conf/env/test.json"]}

defaultChat.text: {"type":"question","questions":["Could you describe the project you want to build?"],"field":"description","help":"A one-line description is enough to get started."}
